label: Stellantis e-CMP (Peugeot e-208/e-2008, Opel Corsa-e/Mokka-e, Citroen e-C4, DS3 Crossback E-Tense, Jeep Avenger, Vauxhall Vivaro-e). Fiat 500e (Mini-platform) decode is separate.
notes: e-CMP requires a special 16-pin OBD adapter cable to expose the diagnostic CAN. Community apps (Car Scanner) include SOH, SOC, battery temperature, per-cell V and module temperatures, but no open-source repository publishes the per-DID byte map. OVMS Github issue #719 tracks an unfinished port. See https://github.com/openvehicles/Open-Vehicle-Monitoring-System-3/issues/719 .

unavailable_fields.all: Field not documented for this vendor at byte-level in any open public source.
